channel.title: NZ Tradie Tools
channel.description: Free calculators, templates and guides for New Zealand tradies.

item.title: How to Become an Electrician in NZ — Apprenticeships, Licensing, and Pay
item.description: Step-by-step guide to becoming a registered electrician in New Zealand — apprenticeships, Electrical Workers Registration Board licensing, and what it pays.

item.title: Tradie Business Plan NZ — Simple Template and What to Actually Include
item.description: A practical business plan template for NZ tradies going self-employed. What to include, what to skip, and how to use a simple plan to actually run your business.

item.title: How to Become a Builder in NZ — Qualifications, Apprenticeships, and LBP
item.description: Step-by-step guide to becoming a licensed builder in New Zealand — apprenticeships, BCITO training, LBP registration, timeframes, and what it pays.

item.title: NZ Tradie Market Update: June 6, 2026
item.description: Latest insights for the NZ construction market in June 2026.

item.title: How Much Do Tradies Earn in NZ? — 2026 Salary Guide by Trade
item.description: NZ tradie earnings by trade in 2026. Electrician, plumber, builder, carpenter pay rates — employed vs self-employed, apprentice vs qualified, and Auckland vs regions.

item.title: IRD Provisional Tax Planning for NZ Tradies — June 2026 Guide
item.description: Plan your IRD provisional tax payments correctly as a NZ tradie. Avoid penalties and manage cash flow with our 2026 guide.

item.title: Winter Roof Maintenance Guide for NZ Tradies 2026
item.description: Essential winter roof inspection and maintenance tips for NZ roofers and builders. Prevent water ingress and storm damage.

item.title: NZ Trades Apprenticeship Guide 2026 — Everything You Need to Know
item.description: Complete guide to NZ trade apprenticeships in 2026. How to find an employer, funding, pay rates, qualifications, and what to expect across building, plumbing, electrical, and other trades.

item.title: How to Become a Plumber in NZ — Apprenticeships, Certifications, and Pay
item.description: Step-by-step guide to becoming a licensed plumber in New Zealand — plumbing apprenticeships, Plumbers Gasfitters and Drainlayers Board registration, and what it pays.

item.title: Red Flags When Getting a Tradie Quote in NZ — What to Watch For
item.description: Know the red flags when getting a tradie quote in NZ. Signs of an unreliable contractor, what poor quotes look like, and how to protect yourself before work starts.

item.title: How to Hire a Builder in NZ — A Step-by-Step Guide for Homeowners
item.description: How to hire a builder in New Zealand — checking LBP licences, getting quotes, understanding contracts, and protecting yourself from problems. Updated 2026.

item.title: What Should a Builder's Quote Include? — NZ Guide 2026
item.description: What a builder's quote should include in NZ — scope, materials, payment schedule, variations, and what's missing from most quotes homeowners accept.

item.title: NZ Tradies Markup vs Margin: The Profit Leak You're Missing
item.description: Learn the critical difference between markup and margin. One wrong calculation could be costing you thousands annually.

item.title: ACC No Claims Discount Ending: What NZ Tradies Need to Know in 2026
item.description: The ACC No Claims Discount programme is ending from 2027. Here's how it affects your levies, timeline, and what to expect.

item.title: NZ Skilled Migrant Visa Changes for Tradies 2026: What You Need to Know
item.description: New trades visa pathways coming August 2026. Learn how to sponsor skilled workers and what qualifications are required.

item.title: NZ Building Consents Up 11% in April 2026: What Tradies Should Do Now
item.description: NZ building consents rose 11% in April 2026, continuing a strong recovery trend. Here's what the data means for tradie pricing, workload, and planning.

item.title: Winter Material Costs for NZ Tradies: 2026 Cost Management Guide
item.description: Manage material inflation in 2026. Timber +3%, gib +5%, concrete up. Strategies for winter project costing.

item.title: How to Recalculate Your Labour Rates When Minimum Wage Increases — NZ Tradie Guide 2026
item.description: Step-by-step guide to updating your labour rates and charge-out rates when New Zealand's minimum wage rises, with calculators and worked examples.

item.title: NZ RMA Reform & Planning Bill 2026: What Tradies Need to Know
item.description: The Resource Management Act is being replaced mid-2026. Here's what the new Planning and Natural Environment Bills mean for your business.

item.title: NZ Tradie Market Update: June 2, 2026
item.description: Latest insights for the NZ construction market in June 2026.

item.title: New LBP Waterproofing Licence Class: What NZ Builders and Tilers Must Know in 2026
item.description: A new LBP waterproofing licence class is coming, with disciplinary fines doubling to $20,000. Here's what NZ tradies doing bathroom work need to know.

item.title: NZ Building Material Prices by Region 2026: Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch
item.description: Current NZ building material prices (June 2026) by region. Track timber, concrete, gib, insulation, roofing, paint. Updated monthly with regional breakdowns and supplier links.

item.title: Scope Creep and Change Orders: How to Protect Your Margins as an NZ Tradie
item.description: Control scope creep with formal change order processes. Protect your margins using NZ Construction Contracts Act procedures and best practices.

item.title: NZ Electricians: New Electrical Wiring Rules Compliance Deadline — November 2026
item.description: The Electricity (Safety) Amendment Regulations 2025 take full effect on 12 November 2026. Here's what NZ electricians must do before the deadline.

item.title: NZ Tradie Outlook: June 2026
item.description: As we enter June 2026, here is what you need to know about navigating the construction sector this month.

item.title: Trade Account Tactics: How NZ Tradies Can Get Better Deals from Suppliers in 2026
item.description: Practical guide to opening trade accounts, negotiating discounts, and cutting material costs at NZ suppliers like Placemakers, Mico, and Mitre 10 Trade.

item.title: NZ Tradie Winter Cash Flow Gap 2026: How to Survive June–August
item.description: Exterior trades lose 20–40% of revenue in winter. Here's how NZ tradies can close the cash flow gap in 2026 without cutting corners or burning out.

item.title: How NZ Tradies Should Raise Their Rates in the 2026 Recovery
item.description: The NZ construction market is recovering fast. Here's how to raise your labour rates without losing clients, backed by real market data.

item.title: NZ Privacy Act 2020: What Every Tradie Must Know About Customer Data
item.description: The Privacy Act 2020 applies to every NZ tradie business. Learn your obligations around customer data, job photos, staff records and privacy breaches.

item.title: NZ Construction Contracts Act: Payment Claims and Adjudication Guide for Tradies
item.description: How NZ tradies can use the Construction Contracts Act 2002 to enforce payment, issue valid payment claims, and win disputes fast through adjudication.

item.title: NZ Construction Site Drainage and Erosion Control: A Winter 2026 Guide for Tradies
item.description: How NZ builders and civil contractors can manage stormwater, erosion control and site drainage to stay compliant and keep projects moving in winter.

item.title: NZ Concreter Pricing Guide 2026: Hourly Rates & Job Costs
item.description: What NZ concreters charge in 2026 — hourly rates, m² prices for slabs, driveways and paths, plus tips to price jobs and win more work.

item.title: NZ Tiler Pricing Guide 2026: Hourly Rates, Job Costs & How to Quote
item.description: Current NZ tiler hourly rates, per-square-metre pricing, and quoting tips to protect your margins in 2026.

item.title: EOFY Checklist for NZ Tradies 2026 — What to Do Before 31 March
item.description: A practical end-of-financial-year checklist for self-employed New Zealand tradies. Income, expenses, GST, vehicles, tools, and tax prep — all in one place.

item.title: Electric Utes Are Here: What NZ Tradies Need to Know in 2026
item.description: Electric utes have arrived in NZ — discover real running cost savings, the new 2026 FBT rates for EVs, and whether an electric ute suits your trade business.

item.title: GST Registration for Tradies NZ — When to Register, How It Works, and What Changes
item.description: Should you register for GST as a New Zealand tradie? This guide covers the $60k threshold, how to register, what changes when you do, and how to file your returns.

item.title: Fringe Benefit Tax for NZ Tradies: Company Vehicles, Tools and IRD 2026
item.description: IRD is targeting FBT non-compliance in the trades sector. Here's what NZ tradies running companies need to know about FBT on vehicles and tools in 2026.

item.title: NZ Tradie Tax Guide 2026 — Complete Overview
item.description: Everything self-employed New Zealand tradies need to know about tax in 2026. Income tax, GST, allowable deductions, provisional tax, and EOFY obligations explained.

item.title: NZ Private Building Consent Authorities: A Practical Guide for Builders in 2026
item.description: NZ's first private BCAs are now registered. Here's what they mean for builders — faster consents, lower fees, and how to decide when to use one.

item.title: IRD Kilometre Rates 2025–26: NZ Tradie Vehicle Expense Claims Guide
item.description: Updated IRD kilometre rates for the 2025-26 income year. NZ tradies: claim more with Tier 1 and Tier 2 rates before your IR3 is due 7 July 2026.

item.title: NZ Tradie Tax Guide 2026: Every Deduction You Can Claim
item.description: A plain-English guide to tax deductions for New Zealand self-employed tradies — tools, vehicles, home office, ACC, and more. IRD-referenced and updated for 2025–26.

item.title: Schedular Payments & Withholding Tax: What NZ Tradies Need to Know in 2026
item.description: IRD's schedular payment rules explained for NZ tradies who hire subcontractors — rates, registration, deadlines and how to avoid costly penalties.

item.title: How to Price a Job: The Complete NZ Tradie Guide (2026)
item.description: Stop guessing and start making real profit. A step-by-step pricing guide for NZ tradies covering labour, materials, overhead, markup, and GST — with real NZD examples.

item.title: How to Mark Up Materials in NZ Tradie Quotes: A 2026 Guide
item.description: A practical guide for New Zealand tradies on marking up materials correctly — with real percentages, escalation clauses, and pricing strategies for 2026.

item.title: How to Write a Quote That Wins Jobs (NZ Tradie Guide 2026)
item.description: A practical guide to writing professional, winning quotes as a NZ tradie — structure, presentation, pricing, follow-up, and a free template. Includes real NZD examples.

item.title: NZ Tradie Mental Health: What the Construction Industry Isn't Talking About in 2026
item.description: Construction workers face a 25% higher suicide rate than other sectors. Here's what NZ tradies and bosses need to know — and do — in 2026.

item.title: NZ Gasfitter and Drainlayer Hourly Rates Explained (2026 Guide)
item.description: What gasfitters and drainlayers charge per hour in New Zealand in 2026, why licensed trades cost more, and how to structure your own rate.

item.title: NZ Employment Relations Amendment Act 2026: What Trade Business Owners Must Know About Contractor Agreements
item.description: The Employment Relations Amendment Act 2026 created a new 'specified contractor' category. NZ trade business owners must update contracts or face legal risk.

item.title: Cold Weather Concreting in NZ: A Builder's Practical Guide for Winter 2026
item.description: How NZ builders and concreters can safely pour and cure concrete in cold winter conditions — temperatures, timing, costs, and code compliance.

item.title: Mandatory Home Warranty Insurance for NZ Builders: What's Coming in 2026
item.description: The NZ Government is introducing compulsory home warranty insurance for new builds and large renos. Here's what NZ builders and tradies need to know.

item.title: Where Did All the Tradies Go? NZ's Tradie Labour Shortage in 2026
item.description: Building consents are up but capacity is tight. Here's why NZ's tradie labour gap is the industry's biggest challenge in 2026 — and what it means for your business.

item.description: Learn how NZ tradies can manage their forward book, raise rates in a busy market, and turn down work professionally without burning bridges.

item.description: WorkSafe NZ is cracking down on silica dust exposure. Here's what NZ tradies must do to stay compliant and protect their workers in 2026.

item.description: A practical guide to writing, pricing and getting sign-off on variation orders for NZ tradies — protect your margins when scope changes mid-job.

item.description: Timber up 5.2%, cladding up 5%, concrete up 4.5% — what NZ tradies need to know about material costs in winter 2026 and how to keep quotes profitable.

item.description: How the updated NZ income tax brackets affect self-employed tradies in 2025–26, with worked examples at real tradie income levels.

item.description: With new processing facilities like the one in Porirua coming online, reducing construction waste is now a business imperative. Here is how to adapt.

item.description: A practical guide to winter workwear and PPE for NZ tradies in 2026 — real NZD prices, WorkSafe requirements, layering tips and what to buy.

item.description: How NZ tradies can set up maintenance service agreements to create predictable monthly income, reduce slow periods, and grow their business in 2026.

item.description: A practical guide for NZ tradies on WorkSafe's notifiable event rules — what to report, when, and the penalties for getting it wrong.

item.description: With construction insolvencies at record levels, learn how to assess the health of your clients and protect your cash flow in the current market.

item.description: Makita, Milwaukee or DeWalt? A practical NZ guide to choosing the right cordless tool platform for your trade in 2026, with NZD prices and tips.

item.description: Up-to-date NZ carpenter hourly rates, day rates and per-job pricing for 2026 — decks, framing, fit-out, stairs and more.

item.description: With new planning and consenting reforms coming to NZ, here’s how to stay prepared for the future of construction compliance.

item.description: A practical guide to AI-powered quoting, job costing, and admin tools that can save NZ tradies hours every week — and what to ignore.

item.description: Should NZ tradies buy, lease or hire equipment in 2026? Compare costs, tax treatment and cash flow impact to make the right call for your business.

item.description: Step-by-step guide for NZ self-employed tradies filing their 2025–26 IR3 income tax return, with key deadlines, deductions, and IRD tips.

item.description: Tradify vs ServiceM8 compared for NZ tradies: pricing, job management, quoting, invoicing, and mobile app. Which is better for plumbers, electricians, and builders in New Zealand?

item.description: Everything NZ homeowners need to know about buying a heat pump in 2026 — sizing, brands, installation costs by city, running costs, and what questions to ask your installer.

item.description: WorkSafe has issued a timely reminder that asbestos remains a live risk in older buildings. Here’s what you need to know to keep your site safe.

item.description: Should you upgrade your NZ home insulation in 2026? Costs, payback periods, available grants, and whether ceiling vs underfloor insulation is the better investment.

item.description: Fake tradie scams are rising in New Zealand. Here's how legitimate tradies can protect their reputation, customers, and cashflow in 2026.

item.description: How NZ tradies and contractors can use progress billing and milestone invoicing to protect cash flow on long jobs — with templates and legal tips.

item.description: The 1 May 2026 G12/AS1 deadline has passed. NZ plumbers must now only install dezincification-resistant brass fittings or face compliance risk.

item.description: The new H1 AS1/AS2 editions are in a 12-month transition ending November 2026. NZ builders and insulation contractors need to act now.

item.description: The New Zealand Green Building Council's new 2026 manifesto pushes for energy-efficient homes. Discover the business opportunities for NZ tradies.

item.description: Consents are up 22.9% but margins are still thin. Here's how NZ tradies can price jobs strategically in the 2026 recovery market.

item.description: A new NZ Initiative report confirms tradies earn as much as university graduates in 2026 — and finish their training without student debt.

item.description: With construction insolvencies rising, learn how to protect your NZ tradie business from cash flow gaps and subcontractor risk.

item.description: Learn how to calculate your overhead rate as a NZ tradie, recover costs in every quote, and protect your profit margin in 2026.

item.description: Councils are enforcing EPB deadlines across NZ in 2026. Here's how licensed tradies can find, price, and deliver earthquake-prone building remediation work.

item.description: As NZ construction slows, tradies investing in digital marketing are winning more work. Here's how to get found online and fill your diary in 2026.

item.description: NZ tradies with employees need employers liability insurance in 2026. Learn what it covers, what it costs, and how new WorkSafe rules affect you.

item.description: Learn how NZ tradies can use job costing to track actual profit per job, spot budget blowouts early, and price future work more accurately.

item.description: Essential WorkSafe height safety requirements for NZ roofers and builders working through winter 2026 — wet iron, wind, fall protection and contractor obligations.

item.description: What New Zealand tradies need to know about the Consumer Guarantees Act and Fair Trading Act — warranties, disputes, and staying compliant.

item.description: Beyond the hourly wage: KiwiSaver, ACC levies, leave, and overheads add 30–40% to NZ employee costs. Here's how to calculate and recover them.

item.description: With energy prices rising, homeowners are looking for ways to cut bills. Here's how to position your tradie business to capture this growing market.

item.description: NZ tradies face rising material costs in 2026. Learn when to use fixed-price vs cost-plus contracts to protect your margins and avoid costly losses.

item.description: The Health and Safety at Work Amendment Bill 2026 introduces simpler rules for small NZ trade businesses. Here's what changes and what still applies.

item.description: The NZ Green Building Council's 2026 Manifesto signals a wave of energy efficiency work. Here's which trades will benefit and how to prepare.

item.description: With rising insolvencies and increased material costs, learn how to run a disciplined construction business in 2026.

item.title: Why Industrial Construction is Leading the NZ Market in 2026
item.description: With projects like Christchurch's Ryans Road development fast-tracked, industrial construction is a key growth area for NZ tradies.

item.description: IRD has launched 3,600 audits in six months targeting cash jobs in the trades. Here's what NZ tradies need to know to stay compliant and avoid penalties.

item.title: Markup vs Margin: The NZ Tradie's Guide to Getting Your Numbers Right (2026)
item.description: Markup and margin are not the same thing. NZ tradies who confuse them quietly lose profit on every job. Here's the maths explained with real NZD examples.

item.title: Managing the Slow Season as an NZ Tradie: Cash Flow, Leads, and Mindset
item.description: Every NZ tradie faces slow periods — winter, post-Christmas, economic downturns. Here's how to protect your cash flow, keep leads coming in, and use the quiet time strategically.

item.description: With massive investment in flood resilience projects across NZ, learn about the opportunities and importance for local construction firms.

item.title: Retention Money in NZ Construction: Your Rights and How to Get It Back
item.description: Retentions can tie up thousands of dollars of your money for months. Here's how NZ construction retentions work, what the law requires, and how to make sure you get paid.

item.title: KiwiSaver for Self-Employed NZ Tradies: What You're Missing Out On
item.description: Self-employed tradies don't get employer contributions to KiwiSaver — but there are still government top-ups worth $521 a year on the table. Here's how to claim them.

item.description: A step-by-step guide to calculating the right charge-out rate for NZ tradies — covering overheads, tax, and profit margins with real NZD examples.

item.description: From May 2, 2026, new lead-free standards for plumbing materials have taken effect. Ensure your projects remain compliant.

item.description: ACC levies are changing in 2026/27. Here's what NZ self-employed tradies need to know about rates, CoverPlus Extra, and how to reduce your bill.

item.description: Nearly 40,000 Australian building products are now approved for use in New Zealand. Here's what NZ tradies need to know about lower costs and new options.

item.title: The 20% Investment Boost: How NZ Tradies Can Claim It Before EOFY
item.description: IRD's 20% Investment Boost lets NZ tradies deduct an extra 20% on new assets bought from May 2025. Here's exactly how to claim it before your 2026 return is due.

item.title: Income Protection Insurance for NZ Tradies — Why ACC Isn't Enough
item.description: ACC only covers accidents. If you're a tradie who gets cancer, has a heart attack, or develops a back condition that isn't work-related, you get nothing. Income protection fills that gap — here's how it works.

item.title: Sole Trader vs Company: Which Structure Saves the Most Tax for NZ Tradies?
item.description: At some income level, running as a company pays less tax than a sole trader. The crossover point, the trade-offs, and how to decide what's right for your tradie business.

item.description: NZ roofing costs by job type — reroof, repairs, spouting, tile vs iron — with typical 2026 prices and what affects your quote.

item.description: Everything you need to do when going self-employed as a tradie in New Zealand — IRD registration, GST, ACC, insurance, contracts, and tax obligations explained step by step.

item.title: How Much Do Builders Charge in NZ? 2026 Pricing Guide
item.description: Typical builder day rates, hourly rates, and project costs across NZ — what affects pricing, what to ask before hiring, and how quotes are structured.

item.title: Do You Need Building Consent in NZ? A Tradie's Practical Guide
item.description: Not every building job needs council consent — but getting it wrong costs serious money. Here's a clear guide to what needs consent, what's exempt, and how to check when you're not sure.

item.title: How to Write a Tradie Contract in NZ — And Why You Need One for Every Job
item.description: A verbal agreement isn't worth the air it was said on when a dispute hits. Here's what makes a valid NZ tradie contract, what to include, and when the Construction Contracts Act applies whether you like it or not.

item.title: Provisional Tax for NZ Tradies: What It Is and How to Manage It
item.description: Provisional tax catches a lot of self-employed tradies off guard. Here's exactly how it works, when payments are due, and how to make sure you never get a nasty surprise from IRD.

item.title: Should I Register for GST? A NZ Tradie's Guide to the $60,000 Threshold
item.description: If your annual turnover is heading toward $60,000, you need to understand GST registration — what it means, when it's compulsory, and whether registering early can actually save you money.

item.title: Public Liability Insurance for NZ Tradies — What It Covers and What It Doesn't
item.description: Most commercial clients and principal contractors require it. One uninsured claim could cost you everything. Here's what public liability insurance covers, what it costs, and how to make sure you have the right amount.

item.title: How Much Do Electricians Charge in NZ? 2026 Pricing & Callout Rates
item.description: NZ electrician callout fees, hourly rates, and common job costs in 2026 — plus what affects pricing and how to get accurate quotes.

item.description: NZ plumber callout fees, hourly rates, and typical job prices in 2026 — what to expect before you hire.

item.title: How to Chase an Unpaid Invoice in NZ — Your Legal Options as a Tradie
item.description: When a client won't pay, most tradies don't know what steps are available to them. Here's a practical guide to recovering unpaid invoices in New Zealand — from friendly reminder to court.

item.title: 8 Common Tax Mistakes NZ Tradies Make (and How to Fix Them)
item.description: These eight tax mistakes cost NZ tradies thousands of dollars every year — in missed deductions, penalties, and interest. Here's how to spot them and fix them before they become a problem.

item.title: How Much Do Painters Charge in NZ? 2026 Rates & Project Costs
item.description: NZ painter hourly rates, day rates, and project costs for interior and exterior painting in 2026 — what drives price differences and how quotes work.

item.title: Cash Flow Management for NZ Tradies — Getting Paid and Staying Solvent
item.description: Profit doesn't pay your bills — cash does. Most tradie businesses that fail are actually profitable on paper. Here's how to manage cash flow so you're never scrambling to cover wages, materials, or IRD.

item.description: How the proposed shift to proportional liability might change risk management and construction insurance in New Zealand.

item.description: Diesel prices have surged in 2026, hitting excavation and transport costs. Learn how to adjust your quotes and protect your margins.

item.description: Everything NZ builders need to know about the expanded granny flat building consent exemptions introduced in April 2026.

item.description: How the historic free trade agreement between New Zealand and India might affect material costs and opportunities for NZ tradies.

item.title: Healthy Homes Compliance Work: A Goldmine for NZ Tradies in 2026
item.description: Every NZ rental must now meet Healthy Homes Standards from day one of any tenancy. Here's what work landlords need done — and how tradies can position to win it.

item.title: NZ Minimum Wage Rises to $23.95 in April 2026: What It Means for Tradie Businesses
item.description: The adult minimum wage increased to $23.95/hr on 1 April 2026. Here's how to update your labour costs, quotes, and pricing before you fall behind.

item.title: NZ Building Consent Reform 2026: What Tradies Need to Know
item.description: The biggest building consent reform in decades is underway in NZ. Granny flat exemptions, product approvals, liability changes — here's what it means for your work.

item.title: Subcontractor or Employee? NZ's New Gateway Test Explained (2026)
item.description: The Gateway Test became law on 21 February 2026 and changes how NZ businesses determine if a worker is a contractor or employee. Here's what tradies need to know.

item.title: Hiring an Apprentice in NZ: The 2026 Guide for Tradies
item.description: Everything NZ tradies need to know about hiring an apprentice in 2026 — BCITO changes, Apprenticeship Boost funding, costs, and how to make it work for your business.

item.title: Opportunities in NZ Water Infrastructure: What Tradies Need to Know
item.description: With over $13 billion in planned water infrastructure investment across NZ, discover how tradies can get involved in this growing sector.

item.title: Mobile Invoicing for NZ Construction Trades
item.description: Mobile Invoicing for NZ Construction Trades

item.title: Preparing for Winter: A Maintenance Checklist for NZ Tradies
item.description: As the temperature drops in NZ, help your clients prepare their properties with this essential winter maintenance checklist.

item.title: Managing Rising Material Costs: A Guide for NZ Tradies in 2026
item.description: With material costs increasing, here is how you can manage your margins and keep your NZ tradie business profitable.

item.title: Understanding the New Plumbing Self-Certification Scheme for NZ Tradies
item.description: A look at the new plumbing self-certification rules in NZ and what they mean for your workflow and productivity.

item.title: NZ Construction Recovery 2026: What Every Tradie Needs to Know
item.description: Building consents are up 22.9% — but cost pressures are rising too. Here's what the NZ construction industry recovery means for your business.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Insurance for NZ Tradies: A 2026 Guide
item.description: A comprehensive guide to selecting appropriate insurance covers for New Zealand tradespeople in 2026, including public liability, professional indemnity, and tool insurance.

item.title: Why We're Building Fastcrew: A NZ Tradie App That Doesn't Cost the Earth
item.description: The honest story behind Fastcrew — why we got fed up with expensive, bloated tradie software and decided to build something better for Kiwi tradies.

item.title: Tradie App Fatigue: Why NZ Tradies Are Paying Too Much for Too Many Tools
item.description: Most NZ tradies juggle 4–5 different software subscriptions. We break down the real cost and what to do about it.

item.title: Best Job Management Software for NZ Tradies 2026
item.description: Honest comparison of Fergus, Tradify, Simpro, ServiceM8 and more — tested by NZ tradies. Prices, features, and which one suits your trade.

item.title: Fastcrew vs Tradify vs Fergus: Which NZ Tradie App Is Right for Your Business?
item.description: An honest comparison of Fastcrew, Tradify, and Fergus for NZ tradies — pricing, features, ease of use, and NZ compliance support.

item.title: NZ Tradie Health & Safety Guide 2026 — HSWA Obligations for Small Trade Businesses
item.description: A practical guide to Health & Safety at Work Act 2015 obligations for NZ tradies — PCBU duties, SWMS, incident reporting, and what you actually need to have in place.

item.title: How to Get Paid Faster as a NZ Tradie — 8 Practical Tips
item.description: Late payments kill tradie cash flow. Here's exactly how to get paid faster in 2026 — invoicing, payment terms, on-site payments, and legal options.

item.title: How to Grow Your Tradie Business in NZ — From One-Man Band to a Proper Team
item.description: Practical advice for NZ tradies ready to grow — when to hire, how to systemise, what software you need, and how to avoid the growth traps that kill small trade businesses.

item.title: Xero vs MYOB for NZ Tradies: Which is Better in 2026?
item.description: An honest comparison of Xero and MYOB for New Zealand self-employed tradies — pricing, features, GST filing, bank feeds, and integrations with Fergus and Tradify.

item.title: How to Get Your LBP Licence in New Zealand (2025 Guide)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to obtaining a Licensed Building Practitioner (LBP) licence in New Zealand — eligibility, application, skills maintenance, and costs.

item.title: Vehicle Expenses for NZ Tradies: IRD Rules Explained (2025)
item.description: How to claim vehicle expenses as a NZ self-employed tradie — logbook, mileage rates, actual costs, GST on vehicles, and what IRD expects.

item.title: Fergus vs Tradify vs Simpro: Which is Best for NZ Tradies?
item.description: A detailed side-by-side comparison of the three most popular job management apps for New Zealand tradies — with real NZD pricing.

item.title: How to Set Up as a Sole Trader in NZ: The Tradie's Guide
item.description: Everything a New Zealand tradie needs to know to start trading legally as a sole trader — IRD registration, GST, bank accounts, insurance, and tools.
